name: golang-github-cenkalti-backoff-dev
title: golang-github-cenkalti-backoff-dev
description:
exponential backoff algorithm in Go
Exponential backoff is an algorithm that uses feedback to multiplicatively
decrease the rate of some process, in order to gradually find an acceptable
rate. The retries exponentially increase and stop increasing when a certain
threshold is met.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cenkalti-backoff-dev because exponential backoff algorithm in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cenkalti-backoff-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cenkalti-backoff-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cenkalti-backoff-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
